definition:
1. growth, stature , especially fine growth, noble stature , (Homer); Νέστορι εἶδός τε μέγεθός τε φυήν τt ἄγχιστα ἐῴκει he was like Nestor both in shape and size and stature  (or growth) , (Iliad by Homer) 
2. poetry for φύσις, one's natural powers, nature, genius , (Pindar) 
3. the flower  or prime of age , (Pindar) (ML)
